title: 尾花栗毛をなびかせて

text_block_list.text:
I head to the racecourse for tryouts, imagining what diamond in the
rough I'll see debut today.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I've got this. I did my training. I can win. I will win, with the strength of my own two legs.

I spot Gold City getting ready to race. Looks like nerves are getting
the best of her.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Where'd you come from? And who are you? Wait, that get-up...
You're a trainer with the academy?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Look, if you've got something to say to me, save it for after the race.
Otherwise, I'll pass.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her words sting a bit as she turns a cold shoulder and saunters off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn my focus to the races, and before long we're already halfway
through the day. Scanning the field of the upcoming race, I spot a
familiar face.

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text:
Wow, she's so pretty! Just look at her!
So she's the one they're all talking about!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... e-excuse me! Are you...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Yes? Are you talking to me?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: I knew it! You're the model, City, aren't you? I've seen you in a magazine. You're so gorgeous!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ah... Yeah, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Whew, with looks like that, you can't help but get excited to see her
race. Go get 'em, City!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Right. I'll be sure to deliver a captivating performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But despite all the attention, during the actual race...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Gold City is still trailing the pack with 400 meters to go! Not looking
good for her!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Come on! I... I'm not done yet! I can still do this!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And she crosses the finish!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Fifth... Damn it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold City puts up a good fight at the very end, but it's not enough.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. That late rally showed a glimmer of potential, but overall a
middling... or lackluster performance. Well, not bad for a model
running as a side gig.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Did you see her running, though? That golden hair waving in the wind—simply enchanting. Wow, am I glad I got to see that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City leaves without a word, but the look of raw frustration on
her face leaves a lasting impression on me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm still going through her race in my mind as I take an evening stroll
along the riverbank.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, City! Time out, time out! You're literally going to kill me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... What, Jordan, you already beat?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, yeah I'm beat. But City, you're feeling it in your legs too, aren't you? It's right after a big race—you seriously need to rest.

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text: City, Jordan's right.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, what the—?! Geez, that scared me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Manager... Hmph. What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Any more of this and it'll affect your work tomorrow. Just look at
those wobbly legs—what if you fall and hurt yourself?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah. Wouldn't want a scratch on your precious money
mannequin.

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text: City... Listen to me. I care about you, and I'm saying this for your sake.

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text: I've set up this next shoot to perfectly fit your image—cool, fierce, gorgeous, and—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I get it! I'll do my job, all right?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You've done a lot for me—I'm thankful. And I owe you big time, so I'm
not trying to quit modeling or anything.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But I'm also going to keep running and training! And I've told you again and again to stay out of that!

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
...And I've always said that I'm against it. City, you don't know your
true worth!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh? My worth?! Choose your words more carefully if you're trying to
curry favor! I know I'm worth more than being your pinup—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! I'm totally craving a bowl of curry right now!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it totally sounded like you said "curry flavor," yeah? You
made me hungry.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So yeah, uh, Manager? Mind if the two of us head out to eat?

text_block_list.name: Gold City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
...All right. I have a meeting about tomorrow, anyway. Don't get
yourself hurt, okay?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...She gone? Phew, talk about tension. Your manager never changes,
huh.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Sorry, Jordan. And nice thinking. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! City with a sincere thank you? Who even are you? ★

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I wasn't kidding about being hungry, though. Can we go eat, like,
now?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Nah, I'm gonna run a bit more. You go on ahead.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: For real? Okaaay. Don't overdo it, yeah? Catch you later.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. Let's do this.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm not all looks. I'm not some dumb dress-up doll.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm going to be... the real me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Glistening with sweat and bathing in the glory of the setting sun as
she runs, I am struck by a profound beauty.
